person.name: Gilbert de Lacy
person.alternateName: Gilbert de Lacy of Ewyas Lacy of Trim

birthPlace.address: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Gilbert de Lacy was born circa 1200 at Ewyas Lacy, Trim, and Weoberley, Hereford, England, the son of Sir Walter de Lacy and Margaret de Brewes.

He predeceased his father before 25 December 1230.

«b»Marriage & Children«/b»
He married Isabel Bigod, daughter of Hugh le Bigod, Magna Carta Surety, 5th Earl of Norfolk and Suffolk and Maud Marshall, circa 1224. They had 1 son & 2 daughters:

1.) Walter

2.) Margery, wife of Sir John de Verdun

3.) Maud, wife of Pierre de Geneva, & of Sir Geoffrey, Lord Geneville, Seigneur de Vaucouleurs

«b»Death«/b»
Gilbert de Lacy died circa 25 December 1230; Buried at Llanthony Priory, Wales.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Lacy於1206年11月1日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，他的父親Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath34歲，母親Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim29歲。他於1225年與Isabel le Bigod在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年8月12日享年23歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Lacy于1206年11月1日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，他的父亲Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath34岁，母亲Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim29岁。他于1225年与Isabel le Bigod在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年8月12日享年23岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾利藍尼 普利馬 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Lacy was born on 1 November 1206, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, was 34 and his mother, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, was 29. He married Isabel le Bigod in 1225, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 12 August 1230, at the age of 23, and was buried in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Lacy est né le 1 novembre 1206, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Isabel le Bigod en 1225, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1230, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Lacy am 1. November 1206 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath 34 und seine Mutter Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim 29. Er hat 1225 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Isabel le Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1230 im Alter von 23 Jahren und wurde in Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Lacy è nato il il 1 novembre 1206 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Isabel le Bigod nel 1225, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1230, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Lacyが1206年11月1日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父Walter de Lacy Lord of Meathは34歳，母Margaret de Braose Lady of Trimは29歳であった。1225年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでIsabel le Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年8月12日に23歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランソニー プリマ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Lacy(이)가 1206년 11월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Isabel le Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 8월 12일 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜서니 프리마 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Lacy nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1206, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel le Bigod em 1225, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1230, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em Llanthony Prima Priory, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ro.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Lacy родился 1 ноября 1206 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel le Bigod в 1225 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1230 г. в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности ллантони прима приори, монмоутшир, Уэльс.
